channel.title: Ripping At The SIEM
channel.description: Recent content on Ripping At The SIEM

item.title: Where KQL Failed me
item.description: If I could get the right query and the right automation in place, I could stop the problem before it started. Instead, both cases expose the same annoying truth, sometimes the data is the real blocker. Can I really blame the vendor though?

item.title: From Net-Zero to "Use more tokens!"
item.description: AI may not take your job, but it is already changing who gets hired, what gets measured, and whether businesses still care about promises like net-zero carbon. To complete the irony, I talking to Gemini switching between Chinese & English to try and break its guardrails when I discovered that …
